pkgmetadata.longdescription: China Mobile Cloud Drive (中国移动云盘) is a cloud storage client by China Mobile. It provides file sync, backup, and sharing capabilities. The Linux client is built as an Electron app with Qt5-based subprocesses for backup and sync operations.
中国移动云盘客户端，提供文件同步、备份和分享功能。 Linux 客户端基于 Electron 构建，备份同步子进程使用 Qt5。
